sched/scheduler/run.name: run
sched/scheduler/run.description: Run all scheduled events. This method will wait (using the delayfunc function passed to the constructor) for the next event, then execute it and so on until there are no more scheduled events. If blocking is false executes the scheduled events due to expire soonest (if any) and then return the deadline of the next scheduled call in the scheduler (if any). Either action or delayfunc can raise an exception. In either case, the scheduler will maintain a consistent state and propagate the excepti...
